svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="AI编程重心转移" id="cogShift1"> <mxGraphModel dx="-474" dy="-142" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="500" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="AI 编程改变的不是"快慢"，是写代码这件事的重心" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="540" x="180" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BEFORE" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="以前：人干执行 + 想方向" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="340" x="60" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="查语法 / 翻文档 / 套样板
(大半时间)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="260" x="100" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="敲样板代码 / 调格式" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="260" x="100" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="调小 bug / 排查语法错" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="260" x="100" y="258" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="想：做什么 / 怎么才对 / 边界" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="260" x="100" y="326" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B5" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" value="<i>重心被压在执行层</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="260" x="100" y="386" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="AFTER" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="现在：AI 接执行，人专注上层" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="340" x="500" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;dashed=1;fontColor=#94a3b8;fontSize=12;" value="AI：查语法 / 套样板 / 补逻辑
(被接管)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="260" x="540" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;dashed=1;fontColor=#94a3b8;fontSize=12;" value="AI：敲样板 / 调格式
(被接管)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="260" x="540" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="AI：换视角帮你跳出卡壳" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="260" x="540" y="258" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="人：做什么 / 怎么才对 / 边界 / 校验
(时间大头挪到这里)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="260" x="540" y="326" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A5" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="<i>重心上移，门槛挪了位置</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="260" x="540" y="394" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ARROW" edge="1" parent="1" source="B1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;" target="A1" value="接管"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FOOT" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="坑没消失：幻觉 + 代码质量参差 → 新规矩：CLAUDE.md / 二次校验 / 精准提示 / 模板" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="700" x="100" y="455" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
